title: Reporting volumes of gas production
doc_html:
§49.  Reporting volumes of gas production

Any person required to report volumes of gas production under the laws of this state shall report such volumes in number of thousands of standard cubic feet calculated and determined under the provisions of this Part.

Acts 1992, No. 55, §2
